title: ClosureRecord
description: Schema for closure.json — task closure record, depth varies by task size

taskSize.description: Size classification that determined closure depth

statusAtClose.description: Task status when closure was written

remainingGaps.description: Open items (required for Standard/Major, optional for Micro)

sourceDocsUpdated.description: Whether stale source docs were updated

solvedIssueCreated.description: Whether a SolvedIssue was created from this task

decisionAnchorId.description: Reference to the DecisionAnchor created at this closure
